files.patch:
@@ -16,1 +16,1 @@
-      uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      uses: actions/checkout@v6
@@ -20,2 +20,2 @@
-    - name: 'Set up Java Development Kit'
-      uses: oracle-actions/setup-java@v1
+    - name: 'Set up Java Development Kits'
+      uses: actions/setup-java@v5
@@ -23,2 +23,4 @@
-        website: oracle.com
-        release: 21
+        distribution: 'oracle'
+        java-version: |
+          25
+          21
@@ -46,0 +48,1 @@
+        export JDK25HOME=$JAVA_HOME_25_X64
@@ -52,1 +55,1 @@
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v6

@@ -3,1 +3,1 @@
-_nothing noteworthy, yet_
+* Support [Compact Source Files and Instance Main Methods](https://openjdk.org/jeps/512) in main tests [CODETOOLS-7904141](https://bugs.openjdk.org/browse/CODETOOLS-7904141)

@@ -114,1 +114,1 @@
-by the following variables: `JDK8HOME`, `JDK9HOME`, `JDK14HOME`, `JDK18HOME`.
+by the following variables: `JDK8HOME`, `JDK9HOME`, `JDK14HOME`, `JDK18HOME`, `JDK25HOME`.

@@ -63,0 +63,3 @@
+ifndef JDK25HOME
+	@echo "Warning: JDK25HOME not set; some tests may not have been executed"
+endif
@@ -112,0 +115,3 @@
+endif
+ifdef JDK25HOME
+	@echo "JDK25HOME           = $(JDK25HOME)"

@@ -2,1 +2,1 @@

+ * Copyright (c) 2007, 2026, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
@@ -41,0 +41,1 @@

@@ -0,0 +1,78 @@
+#
+# Copyright (c) 2026, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
+# DO NOT ALTER OR REMOVE COPYRIGHT NOTICES OR THIS FILE HEADER.
+#
+# This code is free software; you can redistribute it and/or modify it
+# under the terms of the GNU General Public License version 2 only, as
+# published by the Free Software Foundation.  Oracle designates this
+# particular file as subject to the "Classpath" exception as provided
+# by Oracle in the LICENSE file that accompanied this code.
+#
+# This code is distributed in the hope that it will be useful, but WITHOUT
+# ANY WARRANTY; without even the implied warranty of MERCHANTABILITY or
+# FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE.  See the GNU General Public License
+# version 2 for more details (a copy is included in the LICENSE file that
+# accompanied this code).
+#
+# You should have received a copy of the GNU General Public License version
+# 2 along with this work; if not, write to the Free Software Foundation,
+# Inc., 51 Franklin St, Fifth Floor, Boston, MA 02110-1301 USA.
+#
+# Please contact Oracle, 500 Oracle Parkway, Redwood Shores, CA 94065 USA
+# or visit www.oracle.com if you need additional information or have any
+# questions.
+#
+
+#----------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+ifdef JDK8HOME
+
+$(BUILDTESTDIR)/CompactSourceFile8.ok: \
+	$(JTREG_IMAGEDIR)/lib/jtreg.jar \
+	$(JTREG_IMAGEDIR)/bin/jtreg
+	$(RM) $(@:%.ok=%) ; $(MKDIR) $(@:%.ok=%)
+	JTREG_JAVA=$(JDKJAVA) $(JTREG_IMAGEDIR)/bin/jtreg $(JTREG_OPTS) \
+		-w:$(@:%.ok=%)/work -r:$(@:%.ok=%)/report \
+		-jdk:$(JDK8HOME) \
+		$(TESTDIR)/compactsourcefile \
+			> $(@:%.ok=%/jt.log) 2>&1  || \
+		true "non-zero exit code from JavaTest intentionally ignored"
+	$(GREP) -s 'Test results: failed: 4' $(@:%.ok=%/jt.log)  > /dev/null
+	echo "test passed at `date`" > $@
+
+TESTS.jtreg += $(BUILDTESTDIR)/CompactSourceFile8.ok
+
+endif
+
+ifdef JDK25HOME
+
+$(BUILDTESTDIR)/CompactSourceFile25.agentvm.ok: \
+	$(JTREG_IMAGEDIR)/lib/jtreg.jar \
+	$(JTREG_IMAGEDIR)/bin/jtreg
+	$(RM) $(@:%.ok=%) ; $(MKDIR) $(@:%.ok=%)
+	JTREG_JAVA=$(JDKJAVA) $(JTREG_IMAGEDIR)/bin/jtreg $(JTREG_OPTS) \
+		-agentvm \
+		-w:$(@:%.ok=%)/work -r:$(@:%.ok=%)/report \
+		-jdk:$(JDK25HOME) \
+		$(TESTDIR)/compactsourcefile \
+			> $(@:%.ok=%/jt.log) 2>&1
+	$(GREP) -s 'Test results: passed: 4' $(@:%.ok=%/jt.log)  > /dev/null
+	echo "test passed at `date`" > $@
+
+$(BUILDTESTDIR)/CompactSourceFile25.othervm.ok: \
+	$(JTREG_IMAGEDIR)/lib/jtreg.jar \
+	$(JTREG_IMAGEDIR)/bin/jtreg
+	$(RM) $(@:%.ok=%) ; $(MKDIR) $(@:%.ok=%)
+	JTREG_JAVA=$(JDKJAVA) $(JTREG_IMAGEDIR)/bin/jtreg $(JTREG_OPTS) \
+		-othervm \
+		-w:$(@:%.ok=%)/work -r:$(@:%.ok=%)/report \
+		-jdk:$(JDK25HOME) \
+		$(TESTDIR)/compactsourcefile \
+			> $(@:%.ok=%/jt.log) 2>&1
+	$(GREP) -s 'Test results: passed: 4' $(@:%.ok=%/jt.log)  > /dev/null
+	echo "test passed at `date`" > $@
+
+TESTS.jtreg += $(BUILDTESTDIR)/CompactSourceFile25.agentvm.ok
+TESTS.jtreg += $(BUILDTESTDIR)/CompactSourceFile25.othervm.ok
+
+endif
